calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Petitioner Dykes Maxwell Young present in pro per for self and as Guardian Ad Litem for the two minors: Madeline Mei-Lin Young and Luca Rodric Young, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
Opposition was filed on 09-17-12 by Nicole H. Young.
After hearing the petition and considerring of the opposition filed, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Ike Maxwell Howell and change names of the minors to Madeline Mae Howell and Luca Rodric Howell
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Reset To Dec-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Reset To Dec-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
